title: Trump demands ABC fire Jimmy Kimmel
summary: President Trump called for Disney to fire Jimmy Kimmel after the comedian joked that Melania Trump looked like an "expectant widow" in a White House Correspondents' Dinner skit. The joke aired days before an armed gunman opened fire at the actual WHCD event, which Trump interpreted as incitement. The incident highlights escalating tensions between the president and late-night media.
content:
President Donald Trump is calling for Disney to fire Jimmy Kimmel. On Thursday, Kimmel joked that Melania Trump had looked like an "expectant widow" in a skit about the upcoming White House Correspondents' Dinner. The skit aired days before an armed gunman made an assassination attempt at the event, which President Trump and Melania Trump attended, on Saturday. They and other administration officials were evacuated from the ballroom.
Trump - who has faced significant speculation over his health in recent months - interpreted the comment as an incitement to attack him. "I appreciate that so many people are incensed by Kimmel's despicable cal …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普要求美国广播公司解雇吉米·金梅尔
zh.summary: 特朗普总统要求迪士尼解雇喜剧演员吉米·金梅尔，此前金梅尔在白宫记者晚宴小品中开玩笑说梅拉尼亚·特朗普看起来像个"待嫁新娘"。这个笑话在一名武装枪手在真实白宫记者晚宴上开枪前几天播出，特朗普将其解读为煽动暴力。这一事件突显了总统与晚间脱口秀媒体之间日益加剧的紧张关系。

title: Google employees ask Sundar Pichai to say no to classified military AI use
summary: Over 600 Google employees, including many from DeepMind with senior leadership roles, signed a letter urging CEO Sundar Pichai to block Pentagon use of Google's AI models for classified military purposes. The signatories argue that classified defense applications could cause reputational harm and occur without employee oversight. The pressure reflects growing internal concern over tech companies' defense contracts.
content:
Google CEO Sundar Pichai arrives for the inauguration of President Donald Trump. | Getty Images	

Over 600 Google employees signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding that Google block the Pentagon from using its AI models for classified purposes, reports the The Washington Post. Its organizers claim many of the signers work in Google's DeepMind AI lab, and include more than 20 principals, directors, and vice presidents. 
According to the Post, the letter says that "The only way to guarantee that Google does not become associated with such harms is to reject any classified workloads. Otherwise, such uses may occur without our knowledge or the power to stop them."  Anthropic is currently in a legal battle with the Pentagon over being …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌员工要求桑达尔·皮查伊拒绝将AI用于机密军事目的
zh.summary: 超过600名谷歌员工，包括许多来自DeepMind的高管，签署了一封信，敦促首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊阻止五角大楼将谷歌的人工智能模型用于机密军事目的。签署人辩称，机密国防应用可能会造成声誉损害，且不受员工监督。这种压力反映了科技公司对国防合同日益增长的内部关切。

title: China kills Meta’s acquisition of Manus as US-China AI rivalry deepens
summary: China has blocked Meta's acquisition of Manus, underscoring the difficulty tech founders face in severing China ties amid escalating US-China AI competition. The deal cancellation reflects geopolitical tensions affecting cross-border technology mergers. The incident demonstrates how national security concerns increasingly shape tech M&A decisions.
content: The unwinding of Meta’s deal shows how tech founders struggle to cut China ties.

zh.title: 中国否决Meta收购Manus，美中AI竞争加剧
zh.summary: 中国已阻止Meta对Manus的收购，凸显了在美中AI竞争加剧背景下科技创始人难以割断与中国联系的困境。交易取消反映了影响跨境科技并购的地缘政治紧张局势。该事件表明国家安全关切如何日益影响科技并购决策。

title: Study: Infrasound likely a key factor in alleged hauntings
summary: A new study finds that low-frequency infrasound below 20 Hz can raise cortisol levels and increase irritability, potentially explaining alleged paranormal hauntings. The research provides a scientific mechanism for why people experience eerie sensations in certain environments. The findings offer a naturalistic explanation for supernatural claims.
content: Low-frequency infrasound (below 20 Hz) can raise cortisol levels in saliva and increase irritability.

zh.title: 研究：次声可能是所谓闹鬼现象的关键因素
zh.summary: 一项新研究发现，20赫兹以下的低频次声可以提高皮质醇水平并增加易怒性，可能解释所谓的超自然闹鬼现象。该研究为人们在某些环境中感到诡异的科学机制提供了解释。这些发现为超自然现象提供了一个自然主义的解释。

title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
summary: OpenAI secured major concessions from Microsoft allowing it to sell products on AWS, with Microsoft receiving increased revenue-sharing benefits in return while maintaining its status as the primary cloud partner. The agreement ends Microsoft's exclusive partnership restrictions that had shaped OpenAI's infrastructure strategy. The restructuring marks a significant shift in how the companies' partnership will operate.
content: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft get more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

zh.title: OpenAI 结束微软在50亿美元亚马逊交易中的法律困境
zh.summary: OpenAI 从微软获得了重大让步，允许其在 AWS 上销售产品，微软作为交换获得了增加的收入分享权益，同时保持其作为主要云合作伙伴的地位。该协议结束了微软独家合作伙伴限制。重组标志着公司合作伙伴关系运营方式的重大转变。

title: Steam Controller: The Ars Technica review
summary: Valve's new Steam Controller, priced at $99, delivers solid customization features but raises questions about price justification in a market where gamers have established controller preferences. The device offers unprecedented control options compared to console controllers. The review highlights both innovation and cost considerations for potential buyers.
content: Valve's new hardware is solid but might not justify its $99 price.

zh.title: Steam 控制器：Ars Technica 评测
zh.summary: Valve 新推出的 Steam 控制器定价 99 美元，提供了可靠的定制功能，但在游戏玩家已建立控制器偏好的市场中引发了关于价格合理性的疑问。该设备与控制台控制器相比提供了前所未有的控制选项。评测强调了对潜在买家的创新和成本考量。

title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
summary: David Silver, a former DeepMind researcher, founded Ineffable Intelligence which raised $1.1 billion at a $5.1 billion valuation to develop AI systems that learn without human-generated data. The funding represents a significant bet on an alternative approach to AI training that could reduce dependency on human-curated datasets. The startup launches with substantial resources to pursue this novel development path.
content: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

zh.title: DeepMind的David Silver融资11亿美元构建无需人类数据的AI
zh.summary: DeepMind前研究员David Silver创办Ineffable Intelligence公司，以51亿美元估值融资11亿美元，开发无需人类生成数据的AI系统。此融资代表对AI训练替代方案的重大投资，可能降低对人工策划数据集的依赖。该初创公司拥有充足资源追求这一创新发展道路。

title: Conspiracy theories are swirling about the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting
summary: An armed gunman opened fire at the White House Correspondents' Dinner on Saturday evening, injuring no one before being arrested, but conspiracy theories quickly emerged claiming the incident was staged. The false narratives echo broader skepticism among some groups about recent assassination attempts against President Trump. The rapid misinformation spread underscores how false claims accelerate during high-profile security incidents.
content:
Melania and Donald Trump attend the White House Correspondents' dinner on April 25, 2026. (Photo by Mandel NGAN / AFP via Getty Images) | AFP via Getty Images	

On Saturday evening, a room full of journalists, media personalities, and senior members of Donald Trump's administration descended into chaos as gunshots rang out at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Nobody was hurt, and the suspect was taken into custody - but it didn't take long for a narrative of doubt to take hold online.
There is no evidence that the attack at the WHCD was staged - but the conspiracies echo an increasingly common belief held even by some former Trump loyalists that the president is faking assassination attempts. Many people online appear to earnestly believe this attack is just the latest iteration.
On X, Threa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 围绕白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件的阴谋论四处蔓延
zh.summary: 武装枪手周六晚在白宫记者协会晚宴上开枪，被逮捕前未造成伤害，但阴谋论迅速出现声称事件为伪造。虚假叙述反映某些群体对近期针对特朗普总统暗杀企图的广泛怀疑。虚假信息快速传播凸显高调安保事件期间虚假声明如何加速扩散。

title: Hacker who allegedly carried out cyberattacks for China is extradited to U.S.
summary: Xu Zewei, accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that breached thousands of U.S. organizations, has been extradited to face charges in the United States. The group allegedly stole COVID-19 research and conducted extensive espionage against American institutions. The extradition marks a significant law enforcement action in ongoing US-China cybersecurity tensions.
content: Xu Zewei is accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that broke into thousands of U.S. organizations and stole COVID-19-related research.

zh.title: 涉嫌为中国实施网络攻击的黑客被引渡至美国
zh.summary: 被控参与中国政府黑客组织的徐泽伟已被引渡至美国面临指控，该组织被指入侵了数千个美国组织。黑客组织被指窃取COVID-19研究并对美国机构进行广泛间谍活动。此次引渡标志着美中网络安全紧张局势中的重大执法行动。

title: Why the Steam Controller is (and isn’t) a big deal
summary: The Steam Controller offers unprecedented customization capabilities through Steam Input, allowing multiple control schemes for different game scenarios that console controllers cannot match. However, most PC gamers already have established preferences with brands like DualSense or 8BitDo, potentially limiting its market appeal. The device's significance depends on whether customization advantages overcome alternatives already in players' collections.
content:
It’s not reductive to call it a Steam Deck without the screen. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Most PC gamers already have a controller they love using with Steam - a Sony DualSense, a 8BitDo Ultimate, a Nintendo Switch Pro, or something else. Part of that love comes from Steam treating them like "native" controllers. They can do the things that made the first Steam Controller worth buying. Namely, they offer a level of customizable control never before seen on PC and that you still can't get on a console.
With Steam Input, any of those controllers can have multiple control schemes for different game scenarios (flight, on-foot, in menus), and you swap between them with a button press. You can also create onscreen menus that bloom whe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Steam 控制器为什么是(也不是)大事件
zh.summary: Steam 控制器通过 Steam Input 提供前所未有的自定义能力，允许为不同游戏场景设置多个控制方案，这是主机控制器无法实现的。但是，大多数 PC 玩家已经对 DualSense 或 8BitDo 等品牌有了既定偏好，可能限制其市场吸引力。该设备的重要性取决于其自定义优势是否能超越玩家已有的替代品。

title: Valve’s new Steam Controller isn’t perfect, but I’m buying one anyway
summary: A Verge reviewer spent over two weeks with Valve's new Steam Controller and found it compelling enough to replace their Steam Deck as their primary couch gaming device despite minor imperfections. The controller's superior ergonomics and extensive customization options make it attractive for home gaming experiences. The hands-on assessment provides practical insights into the device's real-world usability.
content:
After my brief hands-on last year with Valve's new Steam Controller, I said it might be my dream controller. I've been looking for a controller with the customization and sheer function available on Valve's Steam Deck while I'm playing games on the TV. You, me, and a lot of other people have been waiting for this. 
I've had the new controller in my hands for more than two weeks, and it's already changing how I play at home. I used to make the Steam Deck handheld my go-to couch gaming experience because of how good it feels to hold, but the Controller has me docking my Deck to play on the TV because it feels even better.
I've spent hours cr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve 新 Steam 控制器不完美，但我还是要买
zh.summary: Verge 的一位评测者使用 Valve 的新 Steam 控制器超过两周，尽管有一些小缺陷，但仍觉得它足以替代 Steam Deck 成为主要沙发游戏设备。该控制器优越的人体工程学设计和广泛的自定义选项对居家游戏体验很有吸引力。实际使用评估为该设备的真实可用性提供了实用的见解。

title: Valve launches the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine
summary: Valve released the Steam Controller on May 4th at $99 USD, with the companion Steam Machine delayed due to memory shortages in the hardware supply chain. The staggered release allows the controller to reach consumers independently while companion devices remain in development. The pricing and availability represent the first major piece of Valve's new gaming hardware slate for the year.
content:
Last November, Valve introduced the world to its new vision of living room gaming: the Steam Machine and Steam Controller. Then, RAMageddon. Memory shortages forced Valve to delay all its hardware and reset expectations. 
Now, Valve is releasing the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine.
The Steam Controller is officially going on sale May 4th at 1PM ET for $99 USD, $149 CAD, $149 AUD, £85 in the UK and €99 in the EU. We've already spent two weeks with the pad paired to our Steam Decks and gaming desktops, and you can read reviews from my colleagues Jay Peters and Cameron Faulkner right now. It's pretty great!
What about the Steam Ma …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve 推出 Steam 控制器，但没有 Steam 机器
zh.summary: Valve 于 5 月 4 日以 99 美元的价格发布了 Steam 控制器，但配套的 Steam 机器因硬件供应链中的内存短缺而延迟。分阶段发布使控制器能独立到达消费者，而配套设备仍在开发中。定价和可用性代表了 Valve 今年新游戏硬件计划的第一个重要部分。

title: We reviewed Valve’s new Steam Controller, ask us anything
summary: Verge reporters Jay Peters and Cameron Faulkner spent over two weeks testing Valve's new Steam Controller ahead of its May 4th launch at $99 and are offering reader interaction about their findings. The hands-on experience provides early professional assessment of the device's capabilities and performance. The Q&A format allows readers to get detailed answers about the new gaming hardware.
content:
Hey hey, it's Jay Peters, senior reporter at The Verge. Today, Valve finally announced that the second version of the Steam Controller - and the first piece of Valve's slate of new gaming hardware set to launch this year - is finally going on sale for $99 on May 4th.
My colleague Cameron Faulkner and I have had the new Controller in our hands for more than two weeks, and we've each written reviews of it. For Verge subscribers, we have a treat: if you have any questions about the new gamepad, we'd be happy to answer them for you in the comments of this article.
Valve hasn't shared any new information about when the Steam Machine PC and Stea …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我们评测了Valve的新版Steam控制器，欢迎提问
zh.summary: Verge记者Jay Peters和Cameron Faulkner花费两周多时间测试了Valve新版Steam控制器，该产品将于5月4日以99美元的价格发布，他们还为读者提供了交互反馈。这次亲身体验提供了对该设备功能和性能的早期专业评估。问答形式让读者能够获得关于这款新游戏硬件的详细答案。

title: Samsung’s first smart glasses have leaked
summary: Samsung's unreleased Galaxy Glasses, codenamed "Jinju," have leaked with specs including a Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1 processor and 12-megapixel camera but no built-in display for the base model. The glasses are expected to cost $379–$499 and could launch at Google I/O next month, positioning them competitively against Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses. Samsung is developing a premium version with a micro-LED display for future release.
content:
The upcoming Samsung Galaxy Glasses look nearly identical to Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses in leaked images from Android Headlines. The glasses, which could be announced at Google I/O next month, are code-named "Jinju" and will reportedly cost between $379 and $499, on par with the display-free Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2. They'll reportedly include a Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1 processor, a 12-megapixel Sony IMX681 camera, a 155mAh battery, and bone conduction speakers; however, this pair won't have a built-in display. 
Samsung is reportedly saving a micro-LED display for a more premium pair of glasses, code-named "Haean," which it plans to launch in 20 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星首款智能眼镜泄露
zh.summary: 三星未发布的Galaxy Glasses，代号"Jinju"的产品规格泄露，配置包括高通Snapdragon AR1处理器和1200万像素摄像头，但基础版本没有内置显示屏。这款眼镜预计售价为379-499美元，可能在下个月的Google I/O大会上推出，与Meta的Ray-Ban智能眼镜竞争。三星正在开发配备微型LED显示屏的高级版本以供未来发布。

title: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
summary: Microsoft announced that its long-standing AGI clause with OpenAI has been officially removed, allowing OpenAI to serve products across any cloud provider instead of being locked to Azure. Microsoft remains OpenAI's "primary cloud partner" under a revised revenue-sharing arrangement, but the change significantly loosens their partnership structure. The shift marks the end of an era defined by AGI-focused commitments.
content:
OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped.
On Monday morning, Microsoft announced a handful of big changes to its long-standing OpenAI deal. Microsoft will remain OpenAI's "primary cloud partner, and OpenAI products will ship first on Azure, unless Microsoft cannot and chooses not to support the necessary capabilities." But OpenAI can "now serve all its products to customers across any cloud provider." That lets OpenAI pursue its goals of courting enterprise custom …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软和OpenAI著名的AGI协议已终止
zh.summary: 微软宣布与OpenAI长期存在的AGI条款已正式移除，允许OpenAI在任何云提供商上提供产品，而不再被限制在Azure上。在经过修订的收益分享安排下，微软仍然是OpenAI的"主要云合作伙伴"，但这一变化大大松动了两家公司的合作结构。这一转变标志着以AGI为中心的承诺时代的结束。

title: Spotify’s next frontier: fitness content
summary: Spotify is expanding beyond music and podcasts into fitness, offering workout videos, curated playlists, and Peloton classes to both free and Premium users. The move represents the streaming service's latest diversification into adjacent markets beyond its core offering.
content: Spotify is adding fitness as its next major category, launching workout videos, playlists, and Peloton classes inside the app for free and Premium users.

zh.title: Spotify的下一个前沿：健身内容
zh.summary: Spotify正在将业务扩展到健身领域，超越音乐和播客，为免费用户和高级用户提供健身视频、精选播放列表和Peloton课程。此举代表了这家流媒体服务向核心业务之外相邻市场的最新多元化拓展。

title: Govee’s multicolor ceiling light doubles as a low-res screen
summary: Govee has launched a $249.99 multicolor ceiling light that uses LEDs to display images, marking the smart lighting company's entry into display technology. The 21-inch Govee Ceiling Light Ultra is designed to illuminate larger rooms and represents the company's expansion into visual display features.
content:
The smart lighting company is having a busy month. After releasing its first solar-powered lights, a cordless table lamp, and an updated LED light wall over the past few weeks, Govee has announced a new multicolor ceiling light. Available starting today through the company's online store and Amazon for $249.99, the Govee Ceiling Light Ultra is larger than previous versions and for the first time uses its array of color-changing LEDs to display images.
At 21-inches in diameter, the new Ultra version of Govee's ceiling lights will potentially be better at illuminating larger rooms up to 30 square meters. While the cheaper 12- and 15-inch vers …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Govee彩色吸顶灯也可充当低分辨率屏幕
zh.summary: Govee推出了价格为$249.99的彩色吸顶灯，采用LED技术显示图像，标志着这家智能照明公司进入显示技术领域。21英寸的Govee Ceiling Light Ultra旨在照亮更大的房间，代表了该公司向视觉显示功能的扩展。

title: Spotify is partnering with Peloton for guided workouts
summary: Spotify is partnering with Peloton to offer Premium subscribers access to over 1,400 fitness classes as part of its broader wellness expansion. The streaming service is also featuring curated fitness content from creators like Yoga with Kassandra, Chloe Ting, and Pilates Body by Raven.
content:
Spotify has dabbled in customized running playlists, but now it's diving more firmly into the fitness space with curated playlists and content from creators like Yoga with Kassandra, Sweaty Studio, Chloe Ting, and Pilates Body by Raven. Not only that, but Premium subscribers will have access to over 1,400 classes from Peloton.
Spotify has already expanded well beyond its music roots, with audiobooks, podcasts, and video. So moving into fitness and wellness doesn't seem like a big stretch, especially since there are plenty of playlists out there built around exercise. But it does further crowd an already messy app.
Users will now have acces …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify与Peloton合作提供有指导的健身课程
zh.summary: Spotify与Peloton合作，为高级订阅者提供1,400多个健身课程的访问权限，作为其更广泛健康扩展的一部分。该流媒体服务还展示了来自Yoga with Kassandra、Chloe Ting和Pilates Body by Raven等创作者的精选健身内容。

title: Is this Samsung’s upcoming wide foldable?
summary: Leaked images reveal Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide with a passport-like design and dual rear cameras, expected to launch later this year. The wide-foldable form factor positions Samsung to compete directly with Huawei's Pura X Max and Apple's rumored foldable iPhone.
content:
The supposed “Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide” dummy unit can be seen in the middle. | Image by Sonny Dickson	

The wide foldable phone that Samsung is reportedly developing is expected to arrive later this year, and now we may have some idea of what it will look like. Leaker and journalist Sonny Dickson has shared images online of what he says are dummy units of Samsung's upcoming Galaxy foldables, including the "Z Fold 8 Wide" - showing a passport-like design that's primed to take on Huawei's Pura X Max and Apple's long-rumored foldable iPhone.
The leaked dummy unit suggests that Samsung's wide foldable will feature a dual-camera setup on the rear, down from three cameras on Samsung's other Z Fold phones. All three of the dummy units feature promin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这是三星即将推出的超宽可折叠手机吗？
zh.summary: 泄露的图像显示三星即将推出的Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide具有护照式设计和双后置摄像头，预计将在今年晚些时候推出。这种超宽可折叠形态让三星能够与华为的Pura X Max和苹果传闻中的可折叠iPhone直接竞争。

title: The AI-designed car is taking shape
summary: The automotive design industry is increasingly adopting AI and advanced 3D visualization tools to accelerate the traditionally lengthy vehicle development process. This shift promises to reduce design cycles that have historically taken five or more years from initial sketch to production.
content:
The auto design world is full of advanced 3D visualization tools and VR sculpting platforms, but your average new car still enters the world as a sketch. 
Those sketches traditionally see endless iteration and refinement from all angles before being turned into 3D models by hand, some dying in the digital world, others sculpted into clay to better visualize lines and profiles. That's just the beginning of a design and development process that often takes a half-decade or more. 
That means many new cars hitting dealerships this summer were first sketched in 2020 or 2021, initiatives kicked off when alternative fuel incentives were widesprea …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI设计的汽车正在成形
zh.summary: 汽车设计行业越来越多地采用AI和先进的3D可视化工具来加速传统上冗长的车辆开发过程。这一转变有望将设计周期从初始概念到生产所历来需要的五年或更长时间大幅缩短。

title: Meet the players who lost big money on Peter Molyneux’s failed Legacy
summary: Peter Molyneux's play-to-earn game Legacy, which generated millions in NFT sales, effectively collapsed within weeks of launch. The failed project illustrates the risks facing hyped NFT gaming ventures that struggle to retain users and deliver promised gameplay experiences.
content: After millions in NFT sales, the hyped “play to earn” game was effectively dead in weeks.

zh.title: 在彼得·莫利纽克斯失败的Legacy中损失巨资的玩家
zh.summary: 彼得·莫利纽克斯的边玩边赚游戏Legacy曾产生数百万美元的NFT销售额，但在推出几周内实际上就崩溃了。这个失败的项目说明了受关注的NFT游戏项目面临的风险，这些项目难以留住用户并兑现承诺的游戏体验。

title: This touchscreen mouse is my over-engineering nightmare
summary: Turtle Beach's new $160 Command Series MC7 gaming mouse features a 2.25-inch touchscreen display designed for macros and app controls, though its placement risks accidental activation. The design echoes Apple's controversial MacBook Pro Touch Bar, raising questions about practical usability.
content:
Who’s asking for this? | Image: Turtle Beach	

Turtle Beach's latest collection of PC peripherals are so focused around touchscreen displays that the company even slapped one on a gaming mouse. The $160 wireless Command Series MC7 features a 2.25-inch touch display bar on the left side of the mouse, which seems to be located in just the right position for users to worry about accidentally hitting it with their thumbs.
The display bar is designed to function like a built-in Stream Deck, allowing users to assign customizable commands for macros, apps, and OBS controls. It also brings to mind the infamous MacBook Pro Touch Bar, which was easy to accidentally hit while typing until the feat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款触屏鼠标是我的过度设计噩梦
zh.summary: Turtle Beach的新款$160 Command Series MC7游戏鼠标配备2.25英寸触屏显示屏，用于宏命令和应用控制，但其位置可能导致误触。这种设计让人想起苹果备受争议的MacBook Pro Touch Bar，引发了对实际可用性的疑问。

title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space
summary: Meta has signed a contract with Overview Energy to explore space-based solar power delivery, demonstrating growing interest in orbital renewable energy. The partnership marks Overview Energy's first major agreement and signals Meta's efforts to secure alternative energy sources for its infrastructure.
content: Overview Energy's first contract with Meta is a small step toward a future of space-based solar power.

zh.title: Meta与太空公司签约获取夜间太阳能供电
zh.summary: Meta与Overview Energy签订合同，探索基于太空的太阳能供电，展示了对轨道可再生能源日益增长的兴趣。这次合作标志着Overview Energy首次重大协议，并表明Meta正努力为其基础设施获取替代能源。

title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
summary: Truecaller, the Indian caller identification platform, faces slowing growth as it matures in its core market. The company is shifting toward subscription services, business-focused offerings, and new features to sustain momentum and expand internationally beyond India. This strategy reflects the challenge mature platforms face in emerging markets when seeking diversified revenue streams.
content: As growth slows, Truecaller is leaning on subscriptions, business services, and new features to sustain momentum beyond India.

zh.title: Truecaller 面临增长成熟带来的巨大压力
zh.summary: 印度来电识别平台 Truecaller 在其核心市场趋于成熟的情况下面临增长放缓。该公司正在转向订阅服务、面向企业的产品和新功能，以保持势头并扩大国际业务。这一战略反映了成熟平台在新兴市场中寻求多元化收入流时面临的挑战。
